metadata.title: Why Two Frozen States Make a Sloshing One
metadata.note: Clean rebuild. Equal n=1,n=2 square-well superposition; density cross term oscillates at (E2-E1)/hbar while energy probabilities remain fixed.

source_of_truth: beat_sheet.json — edit the sheet, not this file

beats.prompt: Each eigenstate is stationary. Their relative phase is not. The interference term turns two fixed patterns into one sloshing probability cloud.

Your turn. Write the beat angular frequency for energies E one and E two, then predict what happens
Two stationary states. One moving interference pattern.
